name: Rasvyat Nuclear Power Station
short_description: A co-op RBMK reactor simulator, with a detailed control room, realistic physics and authentic sound design
detailed_description:
Start up the reactor and keep it stable using real-time physics calculations without triggering the automatic safety systems. Various events can occur, including various system malfunctions, power outages, and more.

Every action made by you and your fellow operators has an effect, even a random choice you made could cause a problem an hour later, any mistake threatens the reactor, risking a reactor trip, damage to equipment or even a reactor meltdown.
